landing.badge: Dhisaha faylalka ugu dambeeya ee horumariyeyaasha
landing.subtitle: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay si aad u soo bandhigto xirfadahaaga, mashaariicdaada, iyo khibradaada.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Waxaan bixinaa dhammaan qalabka aad u baahan tahay si aad uga soo baxdo dadka oo aad u dejiso shaqadaada riyada.
landing.feature1Desc: Si fudud u habayso qaybahaaga, mashaariicda, iyo xirfadahaaga tifaftirayaashayada muuqaalka leh.
landing.feature2Desc: Ka dooro qaab-dhismeedka xirfadaysan ama samee muuqaal kuu gaar ah.
landing.feature3Desc: Raad raac soo-booqdayaashaada, arag mashaariicda hel dareenka ugu badan, iyo in ka badan.

deleteAccount.title: Si Joogta Ah U Tirtir Koontada

deleteAccount.errorMessage: Waa lagu guul daraystay in la diro iimaylka xaqiijinta

privacy.title: Siyaasadda Qarsoonnimada
privacy.updateDate: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la cusbooneysiiyay: Julaay 15, 2026
privacy.intro: Qaanuunka Arrimaha Khaaska ah wuxuu sharxayaa sida DevFolio u ururiyo, u isticmaasho, oo u ilaaliso macluumaadkaaga shakhsiyeed marka la isticmaalayo adeegyadayada.
privacy.section1Content: Waxaan aruurineynaa macluumaadka aad si toos ah u bixiso markaad sameysaneyso akoon, dhiseyso faylalka, iyo la xiriirida taageeradayada.
privacy.section2Content: Macluumaadkaaga waxa loo isticmaalaa in lagu shaqeeyo, lagu hayo, oo lagu bixiyo sifada adeegyadayada, iyo sidoo kale in lagula xidhiidho waxa ku saabsan akoonkaaga ama adeegyadaada.
privacy.section3Content: Waxaan hirgelineynaa tillaabooyin amni oo macquul ah si aan xogtaada uga ilaalino gelitaan, siideyn, ama burburin aan la ogolayn.

forgotPassword.title: Furaha la ilaaway
forgotPassword.description: Geli ciwaanka iimaylka ka diiwaan gashan akoonkaaga Waxaan soo diri doonaa koodka OTP si aan dib ugu habeyno erayga sirta ah.

forgotPassword.resendOtp: Dib u soo dir Koodhka OTP
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Samee furaha sirta ah ee cusub si aad u ilaaliso akoonkaaga

verifyEmail.resendError: Ku guuldareystay in dib loo soo diro iimaylka xaqiijinta Fadlan isku day mar kale
verifyEmail.title: Hubi emailkaaga
verifyEmail.description: Waxaan u dirnay iimaylka xaqiijinta ciwaankaaga iimaylka Fadlan fur iimaylka oo dhagsii badhanka <1>“Confirm Account”</1> si aad u hawlgeliso akoonkaaga.
verifyEmail.step2: Ka raadi iimaylka DevFolio oo wata mawduuca "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step4: Waxaa lagu hagi doonaa bogga galitaanka si aad u gasho
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Iimaylkii xaqiijinta waa la soo diray!
verifyEmail.resendButton: Dib u soo dir emaylka xaqiijinta
verifyEmail.footerNote: Miyaadan helin iimaylka? Hubi galka <1>Spam</1> ama <2>Junk</2> ee ku jira iimaylkaaga. Xidhiidhka xaqiijinta waxa uu shaqaynayaa <3>24 saacadood</3>.
